His research focuses on the psychology of human misbelief, particularly false beliefs people hold about themselves.CognitionOctober 15, 2021People Who Jump to Conclusions Show Other Kinds of Thinking ErrorsBelief in conspiracy theories and overconfidence are two tendencies linked to hasty thinkingCarmen Sanchez, David DunningOpinionJune 8, 2020Which Experts Should You Listen to during the Pandemic?It should be a no-brainer: your best bet is to follow those who have actual expertiseNathan Ballantyne, David DunningOpinionAugust 9, 2018Unknown Unknowns: The Problem of HypocognitionWe wander about the unknown terrains of life, complacent about what we know and oblivious to what we missKaidi Wu, David DunningMind & BrainDecember 1, 2005Picture ImperfectLike a flawed painting, our self-image suffers from poor perspective: we consistently overestimate our skills and overlook our flawsDavid Dunning, Chip Heath, Jerry M.
